metadata.description: Document-management workflows for kusara: validate, audit, and auto-maintain Markdown specs and docs cross-referenced via the kusara CLI.

plugins.name: kusara
plugins.description: Slash commands and skills wrapping the kusara CLI: /kusara:setup installs the binary, /kusara:sync auto-maintains related docs after code or doc changes (parallel fan-out at 4+ affected docs), /kusara:check audits cross-references, /kusara:add-ref authors `refs:` frontmatter. Auto-loaded skills carry the canonical schema and kinds-manifest format.
